column.name: PLNFL
column.description: Sequence

column.name: PSNFH
column.description: Item Number for Production Resource/Tool

column.name: STEUF
column.description: Control Key for Management of Production Resources/Tools

column.name: KZKBL
column.description: Indicator: Create load records for prod. resources/tools

column.name: BZOFFB
column.description: Reference Date for Start of Production Resource/Tool Usage

column.name: OFFSTB
column.description: Offset to start of production resource/tool usage

column.name: EHOFFB
column.description: Offset unit for start of prod. resource/tool usage

column.name: BZOFFE
column.description: Reference date for end of production resource/tool usage

column.name: OFFSTE
column.description: Offset to finish of production resource/tool usage

column.name: EHOFFE
column.description: Offset unit for end of production resource/tool usage

column.description: Unit for Quantity of Production Resources/Tools

column.name: MGVGW
column.description: Standard Value for Quantity of Production Resources/Tools

column.description: Formula for calculating the total quantity of PRT

column.description: Usage value unit of the production resource/tool

column.name: EWVGW
column.description: Standard usage value for production resources/tools

column.name: EWFORM
column.description: Formula for calculating the total usage value of PRT

column.description: Language Key

column.name: KTSCH
column.description: Standard text key for production resources/tools

column.description: First Line of Text for Production Resources/Tools
